name: Aries Spears
blurb: He is best known for his eight-season run as a cast member on the Fox sketch series MADtv (1997-2005), where his celebrity impressions became a signature.
bio: Aries Spears is an American stand-up comedian, impressionist, and actor who broke through on Russell Simmons Def Comedy Jam as a teenager. He is best known for his eight-season run as a cast member on the Fox sketch series MADtv (1997-2005), where his celebrity impressions became a signature. His stand-up is built around rapid-fire impressions and aggressive crowd work.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up as a teenager
Appears on Def Comedy Jam at age sixteen
Releases special Hollywood, Look I'm Smiling

accolades: Second-longest-serving MADtv cast member, eight seasons
Widely regarded for his celebrity impression range
Voiced Wizard Kelly on Disney's The Proud Family

bits.yt_title: Aries Spears | RoboCop and Orgasms - Russell Simmons' Def Comedy Jam, Season 7
